question.text: As per Regulation 2(n) of SEBI (PIT) Regulations, 2015, which of the following is NOT ordinarily included in the definition of Unpublished Price Sensitive Information (UPSI)?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Regulation 2(n) explicitly lists 'change in rating(s), other than ESG rating(s)' as UPSI. ESG rating changes are specifically excluded from the UPSI definition. **The Trap:** Change in ratings is listed as UPSI, so one might assume all rating changes qualify, but ESG ratings are carved out. **Cross-Exam Context:** NISM Series XV (Research Analyst) exam also tests knowledge of UPSI categories. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The exclusion of ESG ratings is a recent amendment - stay updated on SEBI circulars modifying UPSI definitions.
